top_findings.summary: The skill requests broad file operation permissions (Read, Write, Edit, Grep, Glob) without any scope restrictions to Terraform-related directories or files. While provisioning Vertex AI infrastructure may require handling configuration files, these permissions could allow access to sensitive system files (e.g., SSH keys, personal documents) unrelated to the stated purpose, violating the principle of least privilege. Additionally, Bash(terraform:*) and Bash(gcloud:*) commands could perform extensive cloud modifications, but the general file tools are excessive for the core task of infrastructure deployment.
